mapper.select: select `USER_ID` from mt_commission_relation r where r.MERCHANT_ID = #{merchantId} and r.SUB_USER_ID = #{userId} and `LEVEL` = 1 and `STATUS` = 'A' LIMIT 1;
select `USER_ID` from mt_commission_relation r where r.MERCHANT_ID = #{merchantId} and r.SUB_USER_ID = #{userId} and `LEVEL` = 2 and `STATUS` = 'A' LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mt_commission_relation WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'A'
